name: Fun Teatime Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Beat butter and sugar in a bowl until well combined.
3. Sift flour and salt into the butter mixture.
4. Using fingers, rub the mixture until moist clumps form.
5. Gently knead the dough until it is soft.
6. Divide the dough into two halves.
7. Press each dough piece to form a 9 1/2 inch round about 1/4 inch thick.
8. Roll the dough lightly with a rolling pin to smooth the top.
9. Cut out approximately 8 cookies using a 3-inch cookie cutter. Gather scraps, pat them out and cut those as well.
10. Repeat step 7 with the second half of the dough.
11. Place the cookies on two baking sheets.
12. Pierce each cookie several times with a fork.
13. Bake until golden brown, about 10 minutes.
14. Cool slightly.
15. Transfer to racks to cool completely.
